helmet.title: Affiliate Program: Earn Commissions from Your Referrals' Trading Activity | FXPayout
helmet.description: Join the FXPayout Affiliate Program and earn recurring commissions whenever your referred traders actively trade with supported brokers.

herosection.title: Earn Commissions from Your Trading Referrals
herosection.paragraph: Generate recurring income whenever your referred traders execute trades through FXPayout.

commissionsection.title: See How Much You Can Earn
commissionsection.paragraph: Estimate your earning potential from every active trader you refer.
commissionsection.subtitle: Affiliate Commission Calculator
commissionsection.subparagraph: Adjust the number of referrals to calculate your estimated monthly commission.
commissionsection.info: *Estimated earnings are based on your referrals' trading activity.

benefitaffiliatesection.title: Earn Commissions from Your Referrals' Trading Activity
paragraphs: FXPayout allows you to earn commissions whenever your referred traders actively trade.
Simply share your affiliate link, and every qualifying trade generated by your referrals can earn you commissions — without trading or managing client funds.

revenuesection.title: Every Referral Remains Linked to Your Account Permanently
revenuesection.paragraph: As long as your referrals continue trading, you can continue earning commissions. One active referral can become a long-term source of recurring income.

revenues.title: Long-Term Earning Potential
revenues.paragraph: You continue earning commissions as long as your referrals remain active traders. There is no expiration period for your referrals.

revenues.title: Recurring Monthly Commissions
revenues.paragraph: Every qualifying trade generated by your network contributes to commissions that can be withdrawn according to the platform's payment schedule.

avilablebrokersection.title: Your Referrals Can Choose Any Supported Broker on FXPayout
avilablebrokersection.paragraph: Regardless of which broker they trade with, their trading activity can still generate commissions for you.

commissionsystemsection.title: Start Earning Commissions in 5 Simple Steps
commissionsystemsection.paragraph: Whenever your referrals trade, you receive a share of the commission generated through FXPayout. The process is fully automated and requires no additional management.

card_simulation.title: Commission Potential with 10 Active Referrals
card_simulation.paragraph: With just 10 active traders consistently trading, you can build a substantial recurring income stream.
card_simulation.info: *Only 10 active traders can create significant monthly earning potential.

whocanjoinsection.title: Who Can Join the FXPayout Affiliate Program?
whocanjoinsection.paragraph: Anyone with an audience, network, or community interested in trading can benefit from this affiliate opportunity.

users.title: Traders
users.description: Active traders who have connections with other traders.

users.title: Content Creators
users.description: Creators producing content related to trading, forex, or financial markets.

users.title: Trading Communities
users.description: Owners or managers of online and offline trading communities.

users.title: Affiliate Marketers
users.description: Individuals experienced in promoting products and services through digital marketing.

whocanjoinsection.info: *And anyone looking to generate additional income online.

howaffiliateworks.title: Start Earning Commissions in 5 Easy Steps
howaffiliateworks.paragraph: Sign up, share your referral link, and earn commissions whenever your referred traders actively trade.

workflows.title: sign up
workflows.subtitle: Register as an Affiliate
workflows.paragraph: Create your account and join the FXPayout Affiliate Program.

workflows.subtitle: Receive Your Referral Link
workflows.paragraph: Get your unique referral link and start inviting traders.

workflows.title: share

workflows.paragraph: Your referred traders begin trading with supported brokers.

workflows.title: earn

securitysection.info: All trading activities are conducted directly through regulated broker partners.

faqsection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqsection.paragraph: Find answers to common questions about the FXPayout Affiliate Program.

faqs.question: Do I need to trade?
faqs.answer: No. You do not need to trade. Simply share your referral link and earn commissions from the trading activity of your referred traders.

faqs.question: Do I need to manage client funds?
faqs.answer: No. You are not responsible for managing any client funds. All trading activities are conducted directly by the traders through their brokers.

faqs.question: Does my commission reduce the trader's rebate?
faqs.answer: No. Your commission comes from the affiliate commission structure and does not negatively impact the trader's trading results.

faqs.question: Can I promote multiple brokers?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can refer traders to multiple supported brokers available through FXPayout to maximize your earning opportunities.

ctasection.title: Start Earning Commissions from Your Referrals Today
ctasection.paragraph: Join FXPayout today and begin building a long-term stream of recurring commission income.

big_card.info: Commission generated from the trading activity of your referred traders.
